summary: Post-refactor regression validation complete. Backend (pytest 20/20 passed, plus full curl smoke of all listed endpoints) and Frontend (full /admin tab navigation + /terms, /privacy public pages) all PASSED. The split of server.py into routes/admin_users.py + routes/terms.py and AdminPanel.jsx into pages/admin/* sub-components introduced ZERO regressions.

covers: DELETE /api/admin/users/{id} (soft delete: status=deleted + email mangled; hard delete; self-protection 400; admin-protection 400)
GET /api/admin/audit-log (admin audit trail >=1 entry, contains expected actions)

backend_smoke_curl.notes: Login uses HttpOnly cookie (not session_token in body). 1 admin only (founder@thecollectivesavers.co.uk) -> ADMIN_EMAILS allowlist verified.

frontend.playwright_flow: I'M A MEMBER continue -> EMAIL tab -> login -> /admin

results.js_console_errors: None (only an expected 401 on initial /auth/me before login)

critical_code_review_comments: AdminPanel.jsx refactor is clean (144 LOC composer, single responsibility per tab file).
routes/admin_users.py + routes/terms.py use build_router(deps) DI pattern which is good for testability and avoids circular imports.
server.py is still large; consider continuing the routes/ extraction for /api/tyre/* and /api/admin/vpps/* in a follow-up.
Defence-in-depth admin auto-demotion verified by data: only 1 user with role=admin (founder, in ADMIN_EMAILS).
seed_data_creation: None new. Existing 107 users + 7 terms acceptances + 27 audit entries used.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Login UI requires 2 steps: (1) click 'I'M A MEMBER' card on /login gateway, (2) click 'EMAIL' tab in the auth panel, then fill input[type=email] + input[type=password] + click button[type=submit]. Login uses HttpOnly cookies (curl -c/-b), not bearer tokens. Founder is the only role=admin user (defence-in-depth). pytest target: /app/backend/tests/test_admin_users_terms.py.
